tEn: Intern-S1-Pro: Scientific Multimodal Foundation Model at Trillion Scale
tZh: Intern-S1-Pro：万亿级科学多模态基础模型
sEn: Intern-S1-Pro is the first trillion-parameter scientific multimodal foundation model, achieving comprehensive enhancements in both general and scientific domains with advanced agent capabilities and expertise in over 100 specialized tasks.
sZh: Intern-S1-Pro 是首个万亿参数的科学多模态基础模型，在通用和科学领域均实现全面增强，具备高级智能体能力，并精通超过100项专业任务。
absEn: We introduce Intern-S1-Pro, the first one-trillion-parameter scientific multimodal foundation model. Scaling to this unprecedented size, the model delivers a comprehensive enhancement across both general and scientific domains. Beyond stronger reasoning and image-text understanding capabilities, its intelligence is augmented with advanced agent capabilities. Simultaneously, its scientific expertise has been vastly expanded to master over 100 specialized tasks across critical science fields, including chemistry, materials, life sciences, and earth sciences. Achieving this massive scale is made possible by the robust infrastructure support of XTuner and LMDeploy, which facilitates highly efficient Reinforcement Learning (RL) training at the 1-trillion parameter level while ensuring strict precision consistency between training and inference. By seamlessly integrating these advancements, Intern-S1-Pro further fortifies the fusion of general and specialized intelligence, working as a Specializable Generalist, demonstrating its position in the top tier of open-source models for general capabilities, while outperforming proprietary models in the depth of specialized scientific tasks.
absZh: 我们推出了 Intern-S1-Pro，这是首个万亿参数的科学多模态基础模型。扩展到这一前所未有的规模，该模型在通用和科学领域均实现了全面增强。除了更强的推理和图文理解能力外，其智能还通过高级智能体能力得到增强。同时，其科学专业知识已大幅扩展，掌握了化学、材料、生命科学和地球科学等关键科学领域的100多项专业任务。实现这一巨大规模得益于 XTuner 和 LMDeploy 的强大基础设施支持，它们促进了万亿参数级别的高效强化学习训练，同时确保训练和推理之间的严格精度一致性。通过无缝集成这些进步，Intern-S1-Pro 进一步巩固了通用智能与专业智能的融合，作为一个可专业化的通才，展示了其在通用能力方面处于开源模型顶级水平，同时在专业科学任务的深度上超越了专有模型。

contrib.en: First one-trillion-parameter scientific multimodal foundation model, Intern-S1-Pro, achieving state-of-the-art performance across 100+ specialized scientific tasks.
contrib.zh: 首个万亿参数科学多模态基础模型Intern-S1-Pro，在100多项专业科学任务上达到最先进水平。

contrib.zh: 分组路由机制实现设备间绝对负载均衡，消除显存溢出风险并提升大规模MoE训练稳定性。

contrib.zh: 直通估计器用于路由器梯度估计，加速扩展MoE架构中专家嵌入的学习。

contrib.en: Fourier Position Encoding (FoPE) captures both discrete token and continuous wave characteristics for multimodal physical signals.
contrib.zh: 傅里叶位置编码同时捕获离散词元和连续波特征，适用于多模态物理信号。

contrib.en: Dedicated caption pipeline for scientific images generates 270B tokens of high-quality image-text pairs from PDF corpora.
contrib.zh: 面向科学图像的专用描述流水线从PDF语料生成2700亿词元的高质量图文对。

contrib.en: FP8 mixed-precision RL training with rollout router replay and importance sampling matches BF16 performance at trillion-parameter scale.
contrib.zh: FP8混合精度强化学习训练结合回放路由器重放和重要性采样，在万亿参数规模下匹配BF16性能。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to 100+ scientific tasks; broader scientific domains may not be covered.
limits.zh: 评估限于100多项科学任务，更广泛的科学领域可能未被覆盖。

limits.en: Training data primarily from English and Chinese sources; multilingual scientific data not explored.
limits.zh: 训练数据主要来自英文和中文来源，未探索多语言科学数据。

limits.en: Grouped Routing may cause initial expert homogenization, requiring several training steps for differentiation.
limits.zh: 分组路由可能导致初始专家同质化，需要若干训练步数才能分化。

limits.en: FP8 quantization applied only to expert linear layers; other components remain in higher precision.
limits.zh: FP8量化仅应用于专家线性层，其他组件保持更高精度。

limits.en: Agent capabilities evaluated on limited benchmarks (GAIA, Tau2-Bench, ScreenSpot V2); real-world deployment not tested.
limits.zh: 智能体能力在有限基准（GAIA、Tau2-Bench、ScreenSpot V2）上评估，未测试实际部署。

items.en: We introduce Intern-S1-Pro, the first one-trillion-parameter scientific multimodal foundation model. Scaling to this unprecedented size, the model delivers a comprehensive enhancement across both general and scientific domains. Beyond stronger reasoning and image-text understanding capabilities, its intelligence is augmented with advanced agent capabilities. Simultaneously, its scientific expertise has been vastly expanded to master over 100 specialized tasks across critical science fields, including chemistry, materials, life sciences, and earth sciences. Achieving this massive scale is made possible by the robust infrastructure support of XTuner and LMDeploy, which facilitates highly efficient Reinforcement Learning (RL) training at the 1-trillion parameter level while ensuring strict precision consistency between training and inference. By seamlessly integrating these advancements, Intern-S1-Pro further fortifies the fusion of general and specialized intelligence, working as a Specializable Generalist, demonstrating its position in the top tier of open-source models for general capabilities, while outperforming proprietary models in the depth of specialized scientific tasks.
items.zh: 我们提出 Intern-S1-Pro，首个万亿参数科学多模态基础模型。扩展至这一前所未有的规模，该模型在通用和科学领域均实现了全面增强。除了更强的推理和图文理解能力，其智能还通过先进的智能体能力得到增强。同时，其科学专业知识已大幅扩展，掌握了化学、材料、生命科学和地球科学等关键科学领域的 100 多项专业任务。实现这一大规模得益于 XTuner 和 LMDeploy 的强大基础设施支持，它们在万亿参数级别实现了高效的强化学习训练，同时确保了训练和推理之间的严格精度一致性。通过无缝集成这些进步，Intern-S1-Pro 进一步巩固了通用与专业智能的融合，作为一个可专业化的通才，在通用能力方面处于开源模型顶级水平，同时在专业科学任务的深度上超越了闭源模型。

items.en: The advent of Large Language Models (LLMs) and Visual Language Models (VLMs) has fundamentally transformed the landscape of artificial intelligence, offering unprecedented capabilities in reasoning, generation, and multimodal understanding [achiam2023gpt, kaplan2020scaling]. In the domain of AI for Science (AI4S), these foundation models have emerged as critical tools for accelerating scientific discovery, enabling researchers to tackle complex problems ranging from protein structure prediction to materials design [zhang2023scientific, taylor2022galactica, merchant2023scaling]. Large Models serve as a unified interface for processing vast amounts of scientific literature, experimental data, and domain-specific knowledge, thereby bridging the gap between disparate scientific disciplines [singhal2023large].
items.zh: 大型语言模型和视觉语言模型的出现从根本上改变了人工智能的格局，在推理、生成和多模态理解方面提供了前所未有的能力 [achiam2023gpt, kaplan2020scaling]。在科学人工智能领域，这些基础模型已成为加速科学发现的关键工具，使研究人员能够解决从蛋白质结构预测到材料设计等复杂问题 [zhang2023scientific, taylor2022galactica, merchant2023scaling]。大型模型作为统一接口，用于处理大量科学文献、实验数据和领域特定知识，从而弥合不同科学学科之间的差距 [singhal2023large]。

items.en: To build an effective scientific foundation model, scaling model size is imperative due to the immense diversity inherent in scientific domains. Compared to natural language, science encompasses much more specialized fields, such as chemistry, biology, physics, and earth sciences, each with its own unique “language", including domain-specific notations, knowledge, and reasoning patterns. This diversity grows with diving into the frontier science since they often involve long-tailed knowledge and specialized skills. Previous works in multilingual machine translation has founded that a single model requires more parameters when asking it to translate more language pairs, such as the model size for hundreds of language pairs is 90x larger compared to a bilingual model [nllb2022]. A scientific foundation model should possess sufficient capacity to master a wide array of scientific tasks while retaining general text and vision capabilities.
items.zh: 为了构建有效的科学基础模型，扩展模型规模是必要的，因为科学领域具有巨大的多样性。与自然语言相比，科学包含更多专业领域，如化学、生物学、物理学和地球科学，每个领域都有其独特的“语言”，包括领域特定的符号、知识和推理模式。这种多样性随着深入前沿科学而增加，因为它们通常涉及长尾知识和专业技能。先前在多语言机器翻译中的工作发现，当要求单个模型翻译更多语言对时，需要更多参数，例如，数百种语言对的模型大小比双语模型大 90 倍 [nllb2022]。科学基础模型应具备足够的能力来掌握广泛科学任务，同时保留通用的文本和视觉能力。

items.en: In this work, we introduce Intern-S1-Pro, the first one-trillion-parameter scientific multimodal foundation model. Scaling to this unprecedented size, Intern-S1-Pro delivers a comprehensive enhancement across both general and scientific domains. Beyond stronger reasoning and image-text understanding capabilities, its intelligence is augmented with advanced agent capabilities, enabling it to autonomously plan and execute complex scientific workflows. Simultaneously, its scientific expertise has been vastly expanded to master over 100 specialized tasks across critical science fields, including chemistry, materials, life sciences, and earth sciences.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出 Intern-S1-Pro，首个万亿参数科学多模态基础模型。扩展至这一前所未有的规模，Intern-S1-Pro 在通用和科学领域均实现了全面增强。除了更强的推理和图文理解能力，其智能还通过先进的智能体能力得到增强，使其能够自主规划和执行复杂的科学工作流程。同时，其科学专业知识已大幅扩展，掌握了化学、材料、生命科学和地球科学等关键科学领域的 100 多项专业任务。

items.capEn: Figure 1: The SAGE (Synergistic Architecture for Generalizable Experts, including three layers, Foundation, Fusion, and Evolution) framework used in Intern-S1-Pro development, illustrating the core capabilities and the integrated learning process that enables synergistic improvements across domains.
items.capZh: 图 1：Intern-S1-Pro 开发中使用的 SAGE（通用专家协同架构，包括基础、融合和演化三层）框架，展示了核心能力以及实现跨领域协同改进的集成学习过程。

items.en: Following the three layers design in SAGE framework (shown in Figure 1), we demonstrate that Intern-S1-Pro, through joint training on general and specific tasks, can outperform specialized models in several scientific tasks. Contrary to the common belief that specialized models are superior for niche tasks, our findings reveal that a sufficiently large generalist model, when trained jointly, can achieve superior performance. In Section 5.5, we will show in detail that even when using similar training data to specialized models, utilizing a larger model architecture and a joint training strategy yields significant performance gains, validating the effectiveness of our approach.
items.zh: 遵循 SAGE 框架的三层设计（如图 1 所示），我们证明 Intern-S1-Pro 通过通用和特定任务的联合训练，可以在若干科学任务上超越专业模型。与普遍认为专业模型在特定任务上更优的观点相反，我们的发现表明，一个足够大的通才模型在联合训练时可以实现更优性能。在第 5.5 节中，我们将详细展示，即使使用与专业模型相似的训练数据，采用更大的模型架构和联合训练策略也能带来显著的性能提升，验证了我们方法的有效性。

items.en: Scaling model parameters introduces new challenges, and we list two architecture-related problems here: training instability due to load imbalance among a massive number of experts, and the difficulty in sufficiently optimizing router embeddings. Extreme imbalance of experts can cause memory spikes, and the conventional solution is to adopt a robust but slower parallelism strategy. To preserve both the stability and the efficiency, we propose a group routing mechanism that enforces a lower bound on expert load balance. Additionally, while we initialize experts from Intern-S1 to ensure a strong starting point of experts’ (the Fully Forward Network part) weights, the router embeddings require efficient learning to handle the expanded expert pool; thus, we introduce a gradient estimation scheme to accelerate their update frequency.
items.zh: 扩展模型参数带来了新的挑战，我们在此列出两个与架构相关的问题：由于大量专家之间的负载不平衡导致的训练不稳定，以及路由器嵌入难以充分优化。专家的极端不平衡可能导致内存峰值，传统解决方案是采用稳健但较慢的并行策略。为了同时保持稳定性和效率，我们提出了一种分组路由机制，对专家负载平衡施加了下界。此外，虽然我们从 Intern-S1 初始化专家以确保专家（全前馈网络部分）权重的强起点，但路由器嵌入需要高效学习以处理扩展后的专家池；因此，我们引入了一种梯度估计方案来加速其更新频率。

items.en: On the engineering front, maintaining high training throughput is critical. Through the co-design of algorithms and infrastructure, we achieve deep optimization between the XTuner training framework and the LMDeploy inference engine. This synergy allows Intern-S1-Pro to scale to 4×4\times the size of its predecessor (Intern-S1) while incurring only a ∼20%\sim 20\% reduction in training efficiency. This demonstrates that with careful system-level optimizations, massive-scale training can remain highly efficient. Meanwhile, the robust and optimized infrastructure facilitates highly efficient RL training at the 1-trillion parameter level while ensuring strict precision consistency between training and inference.
items.zh: 在工程方面，保持高训练吞吐量至关重要。通过算法和基础设施的协同设计，我们在 XTuner 训练框架和 LMDeploy 推理引擎之间实现了深度优化。这种协同作用使 Intern-S1-Pro 能够扩展到其前身（Intern-S1）的 4 倍大小，而训练效率仅下降约 20%。这表明，通过精心的系统级优化，大规模训练可以保持高效。同时，稳健且优化的基础设施促进了万亿参数级别的高效强化学习训练，同时确保了训练和推理之间的严格精度一致性。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Left: Illustration of the expert expansion process from Intern-S1 to Intern-S1-Pro. The grouped routing strategy ensures well-trained Top-1/Top-2 experts are distributed across groups to maintain training stability. Right: The illustration of Straight-Through Estimator for enabling updating all router embeddings in every pass.
items.capZh: 图 2：左图：从 Intern-S1 到 Intern-S1-Pro 的专家扩展过程说明。分组路由策略确保训练良好的 Top-1/Top-2 专家分布在各个组中，以保持训练稳定性。右图：直通估计器的说明，用于在每次前向传播中更新所有路由器嵌入。

items.en: Intern-S1-Pro is derived from Intern-S1 through expert expansion, as illustrated in Figure 2. In this expansion process, we incorporate the Grouped Routing design, where experts are distributed into groups. We ensure that the experts activated within each group correspond to the Top-1 or Top-2 experts prior to expansion. While this approach results in some homogenization of expert activation during the initialization phase, the experts naturally differentiate after a few step training, and this design significantly enhances training stability. In contrast, assigning differentiated experts corresponding to the pre-expansion Top-1 to Top-8 across groups leads to training instability and performance degradation. For example, we tested two initialization methods on a 30BA3 model and 2000 training steps. The first method can slight outperform the model prior to expansion while the second method have a performance drop over 20pts. Our hypothesis is that the experts that often activated as top-1 selection suggest they are well-trained and important modules, so keeping each group has well-trained experts are essential to the initialization.
items.zh: Intern-S1-Pro 通过专家扩展从 Intern-S1 派生而来，如图 2 所示。在此扩展过程中，我们采用了分组路由设计，其中专家被分配到组中。我们确保每个组内激活的专家对应于扩展前的 Top-1 或 Top-2 专家。虽然这种方法在初始化阶段导致专家激活的某种同质化，但经过几步训练后，专家自然会分化，并且这种设计显著增强了训练稳定性。相比之下，将对应于扩展前 Top-1 到 Top-8 的不同专家分配到各组会导致训练不稳定和性能下降。例如，我们在一个 30B A3 模型上测试了两种初始化方法，训练了 2000 步。第一种方法可以略微优于扩展前的模型，而第二种方法性能下降超过 20 点。我们的假设是，经常作为 top-1 选择激活的专家表明它们是训练良好且重要的模块，因此保持每个组都有训练良好的专家对于初始化至关重要。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Training with Grouped Router can achieve absolute load balancing across devices for MoE models with a Top-k configuration of k=8 under the EP8 training strategy.
items.capZh: 图 3：使用分组路由器可以在 EP8 训练策略下，对于 Top-k 配置为 k=8 的 MoE 模型实现设备间的绝对负载均衡。

items.en: For the training of ultra-large-scale MoE models (e.g., Intern-S1-Pro), Expert Parallelism (EP) serves as the core technical approach to mitigate GPU memory and communication overheads. However, the expert load imbalance caused by the traditional Top-kk routing strategy will lead to cross-device load imbalance during the expert parallel training process. Although a lower degree of expert parallelism (e.g., EP8) and the MoE Balance Loss can alleviate this issue, the phenomenon still persists, and is particularly severe in the post-training phase of large models. This not only significantly degrades the training efficiency of expert parallelism but also causes an Out-of-Memory (OOM) risk during training in extreme cases.
items.zh: 对于超大规模 MoE 模型（例如 Intern-S1-Pro）的训练，专家并行是缓解 GPU 内存和通信开销的核心技术方法。然而，传统 Top-k 路由策略导致的专家负载不平衡会在专家并行训练过程中引起跨设备负载不平衡。尽管较低程度的专家并行（例如 EP8）和 MoE 平衡损失可以缓解此问题，但该现象仍然存在，并且在大型模型的后训练阶段尤其严重。这不仅显著降低了专家并行的训练效率，而且在极端情况下会导致训练中的内存不足风险。

items.en: To address the aforementioned problem, we propose to replace the traditional Top-K Router with the Grouped Router to achieve absolute load balancing across devices under the 8-way expert parallelism training strategy, thereby stabilizing the training process and improving training efficiency. Specifically, let the total number of experts in an MoE layer be denoted as EE, and the expert parallelism degree be SS. In Grouped Router architecture, all experts are uniformly partitioned into GG mutually disjoint groups based on device mapping, denoted as {ℰ1,ℰ2,…,ℰG}\{\mathcal{E}_{1},\mathcal{E}_{2},\ldots,\mathcal{E}_{G}\}, with each group containing E/GE/G experts. For each group gg, only the top-(K/GK/G) experts with the highest scores are selected within the group, and the final set of activated experts is obtained by taking the union of these intra-group top experts, as illustrated in Figure 3. Combined with the configuration of the Intern s1-pro 1T model (k=8k=8) and the EP8 training strategy, we can divide all experts into 8 groups and select the Top-1 expert within each group, ultimately achieving absolute load balancing across devices. This approach not only significantly improves training efficiency but also fundamentally eliminates the OOM risk during training.
items.zh: 为了解决上述问题，我们提出用分组路由器替代传统的 Top-K 路由器，以在 8 路专家并行训练策略下实现设备间的绝对负载均衡，从而稳定训练过程并提高训练效率。具体来说，设 MoE 层中的专家总数为 E，专家并行度为 S。在分组路由器架构中，所有专家根据设备映射被均匀划分为 G 个互不相交的组，记为 {ℰ₁, ℰ₂, …, ℰ_G}，每组包含 E/G 个专家。对于每个组 g，仅选择组内得分最高的前 (K/G) 个专家，最终激活的专家集由这些组内 top 专家的并集得到，如图 3 所示。结合 Intern-S1-Pro 1T 模型的配置（k=8）和 EP8 训练策略，我们可以将所有专家划分为 8 组，并在每组内选择 Top-1 专家，最终实现设备间的绝对负载均衡。这种方法不仅显著提高了训练效率，而且从根本上消除了训练中的 OOM 风险。

full.sec: 2.2 Straight-Through Estimator for Sparse Expert Routing
full.secZh: 2.2 稀疏专家路由的直通估计器

items.en: MoE architectures scale model capacity by routing each input token to a small subset of KK out of NN experts via Top-KK selection. Given the token representation 𝐱∈ℝd\mathbf{x}\in\mathbb{R}^{d} and the router parameter 𝐖r∈ℝN×d\mathbf{W}_{r}\in\mathbb{R}^{N\times d}, the router produces logits 𝐳=𝐖r​𝐱\mathbf{z}=\mathbf{W}_{r}\mathbf{x}, computes routing probabilities 𝐩=softmax​(𝐳)\mathbf{p}=\mathrm{softmax}(\mathbf{z}), and selects S=TopK​(𝐩,K)S=\mathrm{TopK}(\mathbf{p},K). The layer output is:

items.en: We introduce the Straight-Through Estimator (STE) [hinton2012neural, bengio2013estimating] to decouple the forward and backward passes of the routing operation [yao2025densemixer, liu2024grin, liu2023sparse]. In the forward pass, the standard sparse Top-KK selection is preserved exactly. In the backward pass, gradients flow through the softmax distribution without re-normalization. The STE routing weight is constructed as:

In the forward pass, p^iSTE\hat{p}_{i}^{\mathrm{STE}} reduces exactly to the standard sparse routing weight p~i\tilde{p}_{i}. In the backward pass, the gradient of any loss ℒ\mathcal{L} with respect to logit zjz_{j} is:

items.en: Through STE, the router receives consistent data-driven feedback throughout training.
items.zh: 通过 STE，路由器在整个训练过程中接收一致的数据驱动反馈。

items.en: Intern-S1-Pro employs a Native Vision Transformer (ViT) as the vision encoder. The encoder processes images at native resolution, where the visual token count depends on the original input resolution rather than a fixed image size. Such a design allows flexible handling of images with different spatial resolutions and preserves fine-grained spatial information in high-resolution inputs. Visual tokens extracted from the ViT pass through a multilayer perceptron (MLP) projector that maps visual features into the embedding space of the language model, enabling joint multimodal reasoning. The training of the encoder uses contrastive learning with large-scale image–text pairs. Training data includes English caption datasets CC12M [changpinyo2021cc12m], LAION-COCO [schuhmann2022laion5bopenlargescaledataset], and SBU Caption [ordonez2011im2text], together with Chinese caption datasets LAION-2B-Multi [relaion] and Wukong [gu2022wukong100millionlargescale]. The combined corpus contains approximately 300 million image–text pairs. Such contrastive training improves visual representation quality and strengthens alignment between visual tokens and textual embeddings for downstream multimodal tasks.
items.zh: Intern-S1-Pro 采用原生视觉 Transformer 作为视觉编码器。编码器以原生分辨率处理图像，其中视觉 token 数量取决于原始输入分辨率，而不是固定的图像大小。这种设计允许灵活处理不同空间分辨率的图像，并在高分辨率输入中保留细粒度的空间信息。从 ViT 提取的视觉 token 通过多层感知机投影器映射到语言模型的嵌入空间，从而实现联合多模态推理。编码器的训练使用对比学习和大规模图文对。训练数据包括英文标题数据集 CC12M [changpinyo2021cc12m]、LAION-COCO [schuhmann2022laion5bopenlargescaledataset] 和 SBU Caption [ordonez2011im2text]，以及中文标题数据集 LAION-2B-Multi [relaion] 和 Wukong [gu2022wukong100millionlargescale]。合并后的语料库包含约 3 亿图文对。这种对比训练提高了视觉表示质量，并加强了视觉 token 与文本嵌入之间的对齐，用于下游多模态任务。

items.en: Large Models have achieved remarkable success by processing information through discrete "tokens" — whether they represent text subwords, image patches, or audio frames. This tokenization paradigm inherently imposes a particle-like representation on all modalities, treating information as localized, discrete units. However, the physical world operates under fundamentally different principles: light exhibits wave-particle duality, sound propagates as continuous waveforms, and electromagnetic signals possess distinct spectral characteristics. Traditional positional encoding methods, such as sinusoidal encodings or Rotary Position Embedding (RoPE) [su2024roformer], primarily serve to inject sequential order information into the model. While effective for capturing relative positions in text, these approaches are still weak in explicitly modeling the continuous, wave-like nature inherent in physical signals or the spectral properties that characterize multimodal data. This limitation creates a representational gap: language models process physical signals (images, audio, video) by flattening them into token sequences, thereby losing the rich spectral and wave-interference patterns that define their underlying physics.
items.zh: 大型模型通过处理离散的“token”——无论是文本子词、图像块还是音频帧——取得了显著成功。这种 token 化范式本质上对所有模态施加了粒子状表示，将信息视为局部化的离散单元。然而，物理世界遵循根本不同的原理：光表现出波粒二象性，声音以连续波形传播，电磁信号具有独特的光谱特征。传统的位置编码方法，如正弦编码或旋转位置编码 [su2024roformer]，主要用于向模型注入顺序信息。虽然这些方法在捕捉文本中的相对位置方面有效，但它们仍然难以显式建模物理信号中固有的连续波动性质或表征多模态数据的光谱特性。这种局限性造成了表示上的差距：语言模型通过将物理信号（图像、音频、视频）展平为 token 序列来处理它们，从而丢失了定义其底层物理学的丰富光谱和波干涉模式。

items.en: Fourier Position Encoding (FoPE) [hua2024fourier] addresses this fundamental limitation by reimagining how transformer models encode position and structure. Rather than treating positional information as merely an ordering mechanism, FoPE leverages the mathematical foundations of Fourier analysis to simultaneously capture both the discrete particle nature of tokens and the continuous wave characteristics of their interactions.
items.zh: 傅里叶位置编码（FoPE）[hua2024fourier]通过重新构想Transformer模型编码位置和结构的方式，解决了这一根本性限制。FoPE并非将位置信息仅视为排序机制，而是利用傅里叶分析的数学基础，同时捕捉token的离散粒子性质及其相互作用的连续波特征。

items.capEn: Figure 4: FoPE models each dimension as a Fourier series of different frequency components, thereby separating information more effectively and mitigating spectral damage. Inadequately trained frequency components are also clipped as their harmful influence on spectral.
items.capZh: 图4：FoPE将每个维度建模为不同频率分量的傅里叶级数，从而更有效地分离信息并减轻频谱损伤。训练不充分的频率分量也会被裁剪，以消除其对频谱的有害影响。

items.en: Time series is a core scientific data modality, capturing the temporal evolution of complex processes. Their extreme variability in rate, length, value, and dimensionality makes unified modelling challenging. Direct serialization into text tokens or conversion into images typically introduces information loss and limits numerical fidelity. The Intern-S1 family of scientific multimodal LLMs introduce a dedicated temporal modelling module that enables native time series understanding while preserving the reasoning and generalization strengths of LLMs.
items.zh: 时间序列是一种核心科学数据模态，捕捉复杂过程的时间演化。其在速率、长度、数值和维度上的极端变异性使得统一建模具有挑战性。直接序列化为文本token或转换为图像通常会导致信息丢失并限制数值保真度。Intern-S1系列科学多模态大语言模型引入了专用时间建模模块，在保留LLM推理和泛化优势的同时，实现了原生时间序列理解。

items.en: The time series module of Intern-S1-Pro, an enhanced successor to Intern-S1, expands both its disciplinary coverage and task diversity. Building upon its original support for astronomy, geoscience, and neuroscience applications, the enhanced module now incorporates additional domains such as physiological signal analysis and bioacoustics. This expansion enables a broader range of real-world scenarios, including electroencephalography-based depression detection, marmoset vocalization recognition, and electrocardiography abnormality monitoring.
items.zh: Intern-S1-Pro（Intern-S1的增强后继版本）的时间序列模块扩展了其学科覆盖范围和任务多样性。在原有支持天文学、地球科学和神经科学应用的基础上，增强模块现在纳入了生理信号分析和生物声学等额外领域。这一扩展使得更广泛的现实场景成为可能，包括基于脑电图的抑郁症检测、狨猴发声识别和心电图异常监测。

items.en: Furthermore, the time series module of Intern-S1-Pro features an upgraded architecture. As illustrated in Figure 5(a), it consists of a novel adaptive subsampling module and a time series encoder. Given a continuous signal, the module first partitions it into local segments (patches), then captures local dynamics within each patch, and finally models long-range dependencies across segments. Rather than using pre-defined patch size and stride, these are adaptively determined based on the signal and its sampling rate, so that the number of temporal frames are kept within a controllable range (Figure 5(b)). The adaptive downsampling normalizes heterogeneous time series into a uniform representation space, enabling the encoder to handle sequences from 10010^{0} to 10610^{6} time steps while preserving structural features and computational efficiency.
items.zh: 此外，Intern-S1-Pro的时间序列模块采用了升级架构。如图5(a)所示，它由一个新颖的自适应子采样模块和一个时间序列编码器组成。给定一个连续信号，该模块首先将其划分为局部片段（patches），然后捕捉每个片段内的局部动态，最后建模跨片段的长程依赖。补丁大小和步长并非预定义，而是根据信号及其采样率自适应确定，从而将时间帧数控制在可控范围内（图5(b)）。自适应下采样将异质时间序列归一化为统一的表示空间，使编码器能够处理从10^0到10^6时间步的序列，同时保留结构特征和计算效率。

items.en: The evaluation of model’s time series capabilities will be detailed in the evaluation section.
items.zh: 模型时间序列能力的评估将在评估部分详细说明。

items.capEn: (a) Structure of the time series module
(b) Illustration of the dynamic subsampling process
items.capZh: (b) 动态子采样过程示意图

items.capEn: Figure 6: The comparison of natural caption (often occurs in scientific literature) and the desired dense caption for training VLM. The key is the text should explicitly refer the visual elements.
items.capZh: 图6：自然标题（常见于科学文献）与训练VLM所需的密集标题的对比。关键在于文本应明确指代视觉元素。

items.en: Intern-S1-Pro employs a total of 6T tokens of image-text and text data for continued pre-training. Compared to Intern-S1, a key upgrade lies in the caption data tailored for scientific images. As illustrated in Figure 7, the distribution of scientific images differs significantly from that of natural images, demanding higher accuracy in content understanding and greater attention to detail. Although high-quality images are available in public resources, acquiring high-quality image-text pairs is challenging. As shown in the figure, original captions in literature are often brief and lack alignment, their text is an extension of the image content rather than description. To address this, we have designed a dedicated caption pipeline to generate high-quality image-text pairs, thereby enhancing Intern-S1-Pro’s understanding of scientific visual content.
items.zh: Intern-S1-Pro共使用6T token的图像-文本和文本数据进行持续预训练。与Intern-S1相比，一个关键升级在于针对科学图像定制的标题数据。如图7所示，科学图像的分布与自然图像显著不同，要求更高的内容理解准确性和对细节的关注。尽管公共资源中存在高质量图像，但获取高质量图像-文本对具有挑战性。如图所示，文献中的原始标题通常简短且缺乏对齐，其文本是图像内容的延伸而非描述。为解决这一问题，我们设计了一个专用标题流水线来生成高质量图像-文本对，从而增强Intern-S1-Pro对科学视觉内容的理解。

items.en: In the training of Vision-Language Models, high-quality image–text caption data serves as the core supervisory signal for cross-modal alignment. Existing open-source web caption datasets are largely derived from alt-text or surrounding webpage context[schuhmann2022laion, kakaobrain2022coyo-700m], which often exhibit limited image–text alignment and substantial semantic noise. Moreover, scientific images from web sources are insufficient in both scale and domain density, and we show an example in Figure 6.
items.zh: 在视觉语言模型的训练中，高质量图像-文本标题数据作为跨模态对齐的核心监督信号。现有的开源网络标题数据集大多源自alt文本或周围网页上下文[schuhmann2022laion, kakaobrain2022coyo-700m]，这些数据通常表现出有限的图像-文本对齐和显著的语义噪声。此外，来自网络来源的科学图像在规模和领域密度上均不足，我们在图6中展示了一个示例。

items.en: In contrast, PDFs represent the primary carrier of scientific visual content. They contain a wide range of high–information-density figures, including experimental results, statistical plots, structural diagrams, and formula derivations. As such, PDFs constitute a natural source of high-quality cross-modal alignment data, offering more systematic and domain-dense professional visual content. Therefore, beyond leveraging open-source web image–text caption datasets, we independently constructed a large-scale PDF data production pipeline tailored for scientific VLM training. This pipeline extracts sub-figures from massive PDF corpora and generates high-quality captions, enabling the systematic construction of dense, strongly aligned scientific image–text training data.
items.zh: 相比之下，PDF是科学视觉内容的主要载体。它们包含各种高信息密度的图形，包括实验结果、统计图、结构图和公式推导。因此，PDF构成了高质量跨模态对齐数据的自然来源，提供更系统、领域密度更高的专业视觉内容。因此，除了利用开源网络图像-文本标题数据集，我们独立构建了一个针对科学VLM训练的大规模PDF数据生产流水线。该流水线从大规模PDF语料库中提取子图并生成高质量标题，从而系统性地构建密集、强对齐的科学图像-文本训练数据。

items.capEn: Figure 7: The workflow of caption pipeline used in data preparation, illustrating how high-quality aligned scientific multimodal data is produced in a efficient way.
items.capZh: 图7：数据准备中使用的标题流水线工作流程，展示了如何高效生成高质量对齐的科学多模态数据。

items.en: Specifically, we employ MinerU2.5 [niu2025mineru2] for layout analysis and structural recognition, detecting and localizing figures, formulas, and tables, which are then cropped into standardized sub-image samples. We perform precise deduplication using perceptual hashing (pHash) to eliminate redundant visual content at scale. To further improve caption quality, we design a topic classification and model routing mechanism: scientific sub-images are described using InternVL3.5-241B to generate professional, domain-specific captions, while non-scientific sub-images are processed by CapRL-32B [xing2025caprl]. CapRL (Captioning Reinforcement Learning) is a training framework that uses Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards (RLVR) to stimulate dense image caption capabilities. Based on this approach, we trained a CapRL model based on Qwen 2.5 VL 32B to generate high-quality, dense captions for general-purpose data across diverse domains. We incorporated this rich caption data into our pre-training pipeline, enhancing our model’s ability to understand and describe visual content.
items.zh: 具体来说，我们采用MinerU2.5 [niu2025mineru2]进行布局分析和结构识别，检测并定位图形、公式和表格，然后将其裁剪为标准化的子图像样本。我们使用感知哈希（pHash）进行精确去重，以大规模消除冗余视觉内容。为进一步提高标题质量，我们设计了一个主题分类和模型路由机制：科学子图像使用InternVL3.5-241B生成专业、领域特定的标题，而非科学子图像由CapRL-32B [xing2025caprl]处理。CapRL（标题强化学习）是一个训练框架，使用带可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）来激发密集图像标题能力。基于此方法，我们基于Qwen 2.5 VL 32B训练了一个CapRL模型，为跨领域通用数据生成高质量密集标题。我们将这些丰富的标题数据纳入预训练流水线，增强了模型理解和描述视觉内容的能力。

items.en: To enhance linguistic diversity, we adopt a multi-template randomized prompting strategy. Additionally, we introduce a 0.5B-parameter text quality discriminator to filter out garbled text, repetitive expressions, and low-information-density content, ensuring both high knowledge density and strong language quality in the final dataset. This pipeline has been deployed at large scale on PDF corpora across life sciences, chemistry, earth sciences, and materials science, resulting in approximately 270B tokens of high-quality scientific image–text caption data. The resulting dataset provides abundant and high-quality supervisory signals for improving scientific understanding and reasoning capabilities in large-scale VLMs.
items.zh: 为增强语言多样性，我们采用多模板随机提示策略。此外，我们引入了一个0.5B参数的文本质量判别器，以过滤乱码文本、重复表达和低信息密度内容，确保最终数据集具有高知识密度和强语言质量。该流水线已在生命科学、化学、地球科学和材料科学领域的PDF语料库上大规模部署，产生了约270B token的高质量科学图像-文本标题数据。所得数据集为提升大规模VLM的科学理解和推理能力提供了丰富且高质量的监督信号。

full.sec: 3.2 Resolving conflicts between the scientific and textual data
full.secZh: 3.2 解决科学与文本数据冲突

items.en: The integration of scientific data (such as experimental observations, chemical formulas, and structured literature) with general data (such as news and social media) presents significant challenges. Scientific data typically exhibits high logical determinism and structured features, while general data focuses on semantic depth and linguistic diversity [DBLP:journals/corr/abs-2211-09085]. Directly mixing these two types of data can lead to "distribution shift" and "negative transfer," resulting in logical confusion during model inference. To address this issue, Intern-S1-Pro adopts the following three major technical strategies:
items.zh: 科学数据（如实验观察、化学公式和结构化文献）与通用数据（如新闻和社交媒体）的整合带来了重大挑战。科学数据通常表现出高逻辑确定性和结构化特征，而通用数据则侧重于语义深度和语言多样性[DBLP:journals/corr/abs-2211-09085]。直接混合这两类数据可能导致“分布偏移”和“负迁移”，导致模型推理时逻辑混乱。为解决此问题，Intern-S1-Pro采用以下三大技术策略：

items.en: Scientific data is typically represented in highly structured formats, which differ significantly from general data. To handle highly structured tabular information from databases like PubChem [DBLP:journals/nar/KimCCGHHLSTYZZB19], we move beyond simple linearization and instead employ two methods: Template Construction and Task Form Transformation. Through template construction, heterogeneous input-output pairs are converted into grammatically correct, narrative text, ensuring that scientific data aligns with the representation style of general data. This transformation guarantees semantic consistency and minimizes information loss. Additionally, for abstract outputs like lists and matrices, which lack intuitive semantics, we combine domain-specific scientific priors to map numerical symbols to descriptive answers with actual scientific meaning. This allows the model to overcome symbolic barriers and better understand the underlying scientific logic and principles in the data.
items.zh: 科学数据通常以高度结构化的格式表示，这与通用数据显著不同。为处理来自PubChem等数据库的高度结构化表格信息[DBLP:journals/nar/KimCCGHHLSTYZZB19]，我们超越简单的线性化，采用两种方法：模板构建和任务形式转换。通过模板构建，异质输入-输出对被转换为语法正确、叙述性的文本，确保科学数据与通用数据的表示风格对齐。这种转换保证了语义一致性并最小化信息损失。此外，对于缺乏直观语义的抽象输出（如列表和矩阵），我们结合领域特定的科学先验，将数值符号映射为具有实际科学意义的描述性答案。这使得模型能够克服符号障碍，更好地理解数据背后的科学逻辑和原理。

items.en: During the model training, data diversity is key to preventing overfitting. To enhance the diversity of training data, we upgrade both the input and output. First, to address the overfitting risk due to the high repetition of scientific data (e.g., similar protein sequences), we implement Prompt Diversification. By maintaining the core scientific knowledge, we provide dozens of varied instructions for the same concept, expanding the model’s generalization boundaries. Second, to tackle the problem of overly simplistic outputs in scientific tasks (such as results containing only numerical values or conclusions), we introduce the Rollout mechanism. By combining scientific prior knowledge and leveraging a strong base model to assist in generating complete reasoning chains, we transform mere knowledge recall into logical deduction. This significantly enhances the model’s zero-shot reasoning ability in complex scientific scenarios.
items.zh: 在模型训练中，数据多样性是防止过拟合的关键。为增强训练数据的多样性，我们对输入和输出进行了升级。首先，为解决科学数据高重复性（如相似的蛋白质序列）带来的过拟合风险，我们实施提示多样化。通过保持核心科学知识，为同一概念提供数十种不同的指令，扩展模型的泛化边界。其次，为解决科学任务中输出过于简单的问题（如结果仅包含数值或结论），我们引入Rollout机制。通过结合科学先验知识并利用强基础模型辅助生成完整推理链，我们将单纯的知识回忆转化为逻辑推理。这显著增强了模型在复杂科学场景中的零样本推理能力。

items.en: Despite the data transformation and upgrade strategies, the differences between scientific and general data may still lead to conflicts during the training phase. To mitigate these conflicts and reduce negative impacts, we introduce the System Prompt Isolation strategy. During the training cycle, we inject mutually exclusive system-level prefixes for scientific and general data, creating independent contextual processing environments for the model. This strategy effectively reduces data conflicts, improves model stability, and enhances training effectiveness.
items.zh: 尽管采用了数据转换和升级策略，科学数据与通用数据之间的差异仍可能导致训练阶段的冲突。为缓解这些冲突并减少负面影响，我们引入系统提示隔离策略。在训练周期中，我们为科学数据和通用数据注入互斥的系统级前缀，为模型创建独立的上下文处理环境。该策略有效减少了数据冲突，提高了模型稳定性，并增强了训练效果。

items.en: The three upgrade strategies outlined above effectively mitigate conflicts between scientific and general data. These strategies ensure more stable performance in multimodal training, enhancing the model’s ability to perform across a wide range of tasks and reasoning scenarios.
items.zh: 上述三种升级策略有效缓解了科学数据与通用数据之间的冲突。这些策略确保了多模态训练中更稳定的性能，增强了模型在广泛任务和推理场景中的执行能力。

full.sec: 4.1 Stable Mixed-Precision Reinforcement Learning for Sparse MoE Models
full.secZh: 4.1 稀疏MoE模型的稳定混合精度强化学习

items.en: Scaling reinforcement learning to trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts models presents formidable memory challenges. With Intern-S1-Pro featuring 4× the expert count of Intern-S1 while maintaining comparable activated parameters, the sheer volume of expert-layer parameters and activations creates substantial memory pressure even under expert parallelism. Following Intern-S1’s approach, we adopt FP8 quantization for the RL phase, but the extreme sparsity of Intern-S1-Pro demands careful handling to prevent performance degradation under low-precision training.
items.zh: 将强化学习扩展到万亿参数混合专家模型面临着严峻的内存挑战。Intern-S1-Pro 的专家数量是 Intern-S1 的 4 倍，同时保持相当的激活参数，即使采用专家并行，专家层参数和激活值的庞大数量也会造成巨大的内存压力。遵循 Intern-S1 的方法，我们在强化学习阶段采用 FP8 量化，但 Intern-S1-Pro 的极端稀疏性需要谨慎处理，以防止低精度训练下的性能下降。

items.en: Prior work [yao2025offpolicy] has identified training-inference engine discrepancy as a primary source of RL training instability. Several approaches have been proposed to address this: IcePop [team2025every] employs importance sampling and masks tokens exhibiting large train-inference distribution shifts; A recent work [ma2025stabilizing] introduces rollout router replay to ensure expert selection consistency between training and inference engines; MiniMax-M1 [chen2025minimax] advocates for FP32 precision in the language modeling head to improve log-probability numerical accuracy; and KIMI-K2-Thinking [moonshotai2025kimi] incorporates quantization-aware training (QAT) to adapt to low-precision representations. Building upon these foundations, we implement a comprehensive stabilization framework addressing operator-level precision discrepancies, keeping expert routing consistency, avoiding weight quantization mismatch, and applying importance sampling to loss functions.
items.zh: 先前的工作 [yao2025offpolicy] 已将训练-推理引擎差异确定为强化学习训练不稳定的主要来源。已有几种方法被提出以解决这一问题：IcePop [team2025every] 采用重要性采样并掩码具有较大训练-推理分布偏移的 token；最近的一项工作 [ma2025stabilizing] 引入了 rollout 路由器重放，以确保训练和推理引擎之间的专家选择一致性；MiniMax-M1 [chen2025minimax] 主张在语言模型头部使用 FP32 精度以提高对数概率数值精度；KIMI-K2-Thinking [moonshotai2025kimi] 则引入了量化感知训练 (QAT) 以适应低精度表示。在这些基础之上，我们实现了一个全面的稳定框架，解决算子级精度差异、保持专家路由一致性、避免权重量化不匹配，并对损失函数应用重要性采样。

items.en: First, we performed a systematic operator-by-operator comparison between the LMDeploy rollout engine and the XTuner training engine. We identified several numerically sensitive components that contributed disproportionately to divergence, including RMSNorm, router softmax, and positional embedding application. We then reduced the error between the two stacks by minimizing precision gaps in these kernels, ensuring that the rollout distribution is faithfully reflected during training. Second, to enforce expert consistency between rollout and training, we implement rollout router replay: for each token we record the selected expert indices per layer during rollout and replay the same routing decisions during policy updates. To avoid turning expert indices transfer into a bandwidth and latency bottleneck, we transmit these routing traces via Ray object references rather than sending them through the same HTTP channel used for response tokens. Third, we adopt a targeted mixed-precision scheme tailored to highly sparse MoE models. We observe that expert MLP layers account for the largest memory footprint, yet their GEMM operations are comparatively tolerant to reduced precision in our setting. We therefore quantize only expert linear layers to FP8, keep non-expert components in BF16, and use an FP32 LM head to improve the numerical fidelity of log-probabilities, following the general principle that small errors in log-probability estimation can be amplified by policy-gradient updates. This design preserves most of the memory and throughput benefits of FP8 while avoiding unnecessary degradation in sensitive parts of the computation graph. Finally, following IcePop, we modify the REINFORCE objective with dual importance sampling ratios. The loss is defined as
items.zh: 首先，我们对 LMDeploy rollout 引擎和 XTuner 训练引擎进行了系统的逐算子比较。我们识别出几个对发散贡献不成比例的数值敏感组件，包括 RMSNorm、路由器 softmax 和位置嵌入应用。然后，我们通过最小化这些内核中的精度差距来减少两个堆栈之间的误差，确保 rollout 分布在训练期间得到忠实反映。其次，为了强制 rollout 和训练之间的专家一致性，我们实现了 rollout 路由器重放：对于每个 token，我们在 rollout 期间记录每层选择的专家索引，并在策略更新期间重放相同的路由决策。为了避免将专家索引传输变成带宽和延迟瓶颈，我们通过 Ray 对象引用传输这些路由轨迹，而不是通过用于响应 token 的同一 HTTP 通道发送。第三，我们采用了一种针对高度稀疏 MoE 模型量身定制的混合精度方案。我们观察到，专家 MLP 层占用了最大的内存占用，但在我们的设置中，其 GEMM 操作对精度降低相对容忍。因此，我们仅将专家线性层量化为 FP8，将非专家组件保留为 BF16，并使用 FP32 LM 头部以提高对数概率的数值保真度，遵循以下一般原则：对数概率估计中的小误差可能被策略梯度更新放大。这种设计保留了 FP8 的大部分内存和吞吐量优势，同时避免了计算图中敏感部分的不必要退化。最后，遵循 IcePop，我们使用双重重要性采样比率修改了 REINFORCE 目标。损失函数定义为

The second ratio ri,t=πθnew​(yi,t∣x,yi,<t)πθold​(yi,t∣x,yi,<t).r_{i,t}=\frac{\pi_{\theta_{\text{new}}}(y_{i,t}\mid x,y_{i,<t})}{\pi_{\theta_{\text{old}}}(y_{i,t}\mid x,y_{i,<t})}., corrects for off-policy bias introduced by mini-batch updates during training. The masking function ℳ​(ρi,t;α,β)\mathcal{M}(\rho_{i,t};\alpha,\beta) is given by

items.en: We conduct extensive experiments to evaluate Intern-S1-Pro across a wide range of benchmarks from two perspectives: scientific tasks and general-purpose tasks, covering both text-only and multimodal settings. In this section, we first introduce the evaluation setup, followed by a brief description of the benchmarks employed. We then compare the performance of Intern-S1-Pro with other state-of-the-art models.
items.zh: 我们进行了大量实验，从科学任务和通用任务两个角度，涵盖纯文本和多模态设置，评估 Intern-S1-Pro 在广泛基准上的表现。在本节中，我们首先介绍评估设置，然后简要描述所使用的基准。接着，我们将 Intern-S1-Pro 的性能与其他最先进模型进行比较。

items.en: We evaluate Intern-S1-Pro using three evaluation toolkits: OpenCompass[2023opencompass], VLMEvalKit[duan2024vlmevalkit], and AgentCompass111AgentCompass is an agent evaluation framework we developed, which will be released in the future.. The evaluation setup is divided into two configurations: thinking and non-thinking. The specific configuration used for each benchmark is described in detail within the corresponding benchmark descriptions.
items.zh: 我们使用三个评估工具包评估 Intern-S1-Pro：OpenCompass[2023opencompass]、VLMEvalKit[duan2024vlmevalkit] 和 AgentCompass¹。评估设置分为两种配置：思考和非思考。每个基准使用的具体配置在相应的基准描述中详细说明。

items.en: SciReasoner [wang2025scireasonerlayingscientificreasoning] evaluates scientific reasoning across ten diverse disciplines, including physics, chemistry, and medicine, 9 domains in total and 149 concrete tasks. It consists of a unified suite of ten sub-benchmarks with varying question formats such as multiple-choice, fill-in-the-blank, and protocol-based procedural questions, designed to assess both knowledge retrieval and complex deductive reasoning. We use the non-thinking configuration to evaluate the benchmark.
items.zh: SciReasoner [wang2025scireasonerlayingscientificreasoning] 评估跨十个不同学科的科学推理能力，包括物理、化学和医学，共 9 个领域和 149 个具体任务。它包含一个统一的十个子基准套件，问题格式多样，如多项选择、填空和基于协议的程序性问题，旨在评估知识检索和复杂演绎推理。我们使用非思考配置评估该基准。

items.en: SFE [zhou2025scientistsexamprobingcognitive] is an expert-level benchmark comprising 830 verified visual question answering (VQA) pairs across 66 multimodal tasks. Spanning five high-value scientific disciplines, the dataset utilizes authentic raw scientific data formats to probe the cognitive abilities of models in perception, understanding, and advanced reasoning. We use the thinking configuration to evaluate the benchmark.
items.zh: SFE [zhou2025scientistsexamprobingcognitive] 是一个专家级基准，包含 830 个经过验证的视觉问答 (VQA) 对，涵盖 66 个多模态任务。该数据集跨越五个高价值科学学科，利用真实的原始科学数据格式来探测模型在感知、理解和高级推理方面的认知能力。我们使用思考配置评估该基准。

items.en: SmolInstruct [yu2024llasmoladvancinglargelanguage] is a large-scale chemistry-specific dataset that features 14 selected tasks and over three million samples for instruction tuning. The benchmark covers meaningful chemical applications, including forward synthesis and property prediction, providing a high-quality foundation for evaluating multi-step reasoning in molecular science. We use the non-thinking configuration to evaluate the benchmark.
items.zh: SmolInstruct [yu2024llasmoladvancinglargelanguage] 是一个大规模化学专用数据集，包含 14 个精选任务和超过三百万个用于指令微调的样本。该基准涵盖有意义的化学应用，包括正向合成和属性预测，为评估分子科学中的多步推理提供了高质量基础。我们使用非思考配置评估该基准。

items.en: MatBench [Dunn_2020] provides a curated test suite of 13 machine learning tasks for materials property prediction, with dataset sizes ranging from 312 to 132,000 samples. Derived from 10 density functional theory and experimental sources, it standardizes the evaluation of model performance on diverse crystalline and molecular materials properties. We use the non-thinking configuration to evaluate the benchmark.
items.zh: MatBench [Dunn_2020] 提供了一个精选的测试套件，包含 13 个用于材料属性预测的机器学习任务，数据集大小从 312 到 132,000 个样本不等。源自 10 个密度泛函理论和实验来源，它标准化了对不同晶体和分子材料属性的模型性能评估。我们使用非思考配置评估该基准。

items.en: Mol-Instructions [fang2024molinstructionslargescalebiomolecularinstruction] is designed to bridge the gap in specialized LLM training through three primary categories: molecule-oriented, protein-oriented, and biomolecular text-oriented tasks. It includes a vast collection of instruction-following pairs that facilitate the model’s proficiency in handling complex biomolecular structures and functional descriptions. We use the non-thinking configuration to evaluate the benchmark.
items.zh: Mol-Instructions [fang2024molinstructionslargescalebiomolecularinstruction] 旨在通过三个主要类别弥合专用大语言模型训练中的差距：分子导向、蛋白质导向和生物分子文本导向任务。它包含大量指令遵循对，有助于模型处理复杂的生物分子结构和功能描述。我们使用非思考配置评估该基准。

items.en: MicroVQA [burgess2025microvqamultimodalreasoningbenchmark] focused on microscopy-based research, consists of 1,042 expert-curated multiple-choice questions across diverse imaging modalities. The benchmark assesses three critical reasoning capabilities within biological workflows: expert image understanding, hypothesis generation, and experimental proposal. We use the non-thinking configuration to evaluate the benchmark.
items.zh: MicroVQA [burgess2025microvqamultimodalreasoningbenchmark] 专注于基于显微镜的研究，包含 1,042 个专家策划的多项选择题，涵盖多种成像模态。该基准评估生物工作流程中的三种关键推理能力：专家图像理解、假设生成和实验方案。我们使用非思考配置评估该基准。

items.en: Biology-Instruction [he2025biologyinstructionsdatasetbenchmarkmultiomics] is a multi-omics benchmark that evaluates the sequence understanding capabilities of models across diverse biological scales. It integrates biological sequence-based prediction tasks with advanced reasoning requirements, challenging models to interpret complex genomic, transcriptomic, and proteomic data. We use the non-thinking configuration to evaluate the benchmark.
items.zh: Biology-Instruction [he2025biologyinstructionsdatasetbenchmarkmultiomics] 是一个多组学基准，评估模型在不同生物尺度上的序列理解能力。它整合了基于生物序列的预测任务与高级推理要求，挑战模型解释复杂的基因组、转录组和蛋白质组数据。我们使用非思考配置评估该基准。

items.en: XLRS-Bench [Wang_2025_CVPR] focused on extremely large, ultra-high-resolution remote sensing (RS) imagery; this benchmark defines 16 sub-tasks to evaluate 6 types of perceptual and 4 types of reasoning abilities. It challenges MLLMs to process complex semantic relationships and facilitate real-world decision-making in high-resolution geospatial scenarios. We use the thinking configuration to evaluate the benchmark.
items.zh: XLRS-Bench [Wang_2025_CVPR] 专注于极大、超高分辨率遥感 (RS) 图像；该基准定义了 16 个子任务，以评估 6 种感知能力和 4 种推理能力。它挑战多模态大语言模型处理复杂的语义关系，并促进高分辨率地理空间场景中的实际决策。我们使用思考配置评估该基准。

items.en: MSEarth-MCQ [zhao2025msearthmultimodalscientificdataset] is a multimodal scientific dataset curated from high-quality earth science publications to uncover natural phenomena. It transforms complex scientific figures and remote sensing data into multiple-choice questions, emphasizing the alignment between visual perception and domain-specific logical reasoning. We use the non-thinking configuration to evaluate the benchmark.
items.zh: MSEarth-MCQ [zhao2025msearthmultimodalscientificdataset] 是一个多模态科学数据集，从高质量地球科学出版物中整理以揭示自然现象。它将复杂的科学图形和遥感数据转化为多项选择题，强调视觉感知与领域特定逻辑推理之间的对齐。我们使用非思考配置评估该基准。

items.en: MMMU-Pro [yue2025mmmuprorobustmultidisciplinemultimodal] is a robust extension of the MMMU benchmark. MMMU-Pro introduces more challenging multidisciplinary multimodal tasks. It emphasizes expert-level understanding and complex reasoning across a wide array of professional domains, utilizing high-resolution images and specialized knowledge. We use the thinking configuration to evaluate the benchmark.
items.zh: MMMU-Pro [yue2025mmmuprorobustmultidisciplinemultimodal] 是 MMMU 基准的稳健扩展。MMMU-Pro 引入了更具挑战性的多学科多模态任务，强调在广泛专业领域中的专家级理解和复杂推理，利用高分辨率图像和专业知识。我们使用思考配置来评估该基准。

items.en: MMLU-Pro [wang2024mmluprorobustchallengingmultitask] enhances the original MMLU by increasing the number of choices and focusing on more challenging, reasoning-intensive questions. It covers a broad range of subjects, requiring models to demonstrate deeper multi-task language understanding and more robust problem-solving skills. We use the thinking configuration to evaluate the benchmark.
items.zh: MMLU-Pro [wang2024mmluprorobustchallengingmultitask] 通过增加选项数量并聚焦于更具挑战性、推理密集型问题来增强原始 MMLU。它涵盖广泛学科，要求模型展现更深层次的多任务语言理解和更稳健的问题解决能力。我们使用思考配置来评估该基准。

items.en: AIME-2025 comprises 30 high-level competition problems from the 2025 American Invitational Mathematics Examination. The tasks require olympiad-level mathematical reasoning, where models must provide precise integer answers (000-999) for complex problems in algebra, geometry, and number theory. We use the thinking configuration to evaluate the benchmark.
items.zh: AIME-2025 包含来自 2025 年美国邀请数学竞赛的 30 道高水平竞赛题。这些任务需要奥林匹克级别的数学推理，模型必须为代数、几何和数论中的复杂问题提供精确的整数答案（000-999）。我们使用思考配置来评估该基准。

items.en: IMO-Answer-Bench [luong2025robustmathematicalreasoning] is designed to evaluate robust mathematical reasoning. This benchmark features 400 diverse Olympiad-level problems with verifiable short answers. It prioritizes genuine problem-solving capabilities and aims to deter memorization by using challenging, competition-grade mathematical content. We use the thinking configuration to evaluate the benchmark.
items.zh: IMO-Answer-Bench [luong2025robustmathematicalreasoning] 旨在评估稳健的数学推理。该基准包含 400 道多样化的奥林匹克级别问题，具有可验证的简短答案。它优先考虑真正的问题解决能力，并通过使用具有挑战性的竞赛级数学内容来防止记忆。我们使用思考配置来评估该基准。

items.en: RefCOCO [kazemzadeh-etal-2014-referitgame] is a classic benchmark for referring expression comprehension. RefCOCO requires models to localize specific objects in natural scenes based on natural language descriptions. It tests the precise alignment between linguistic instructions and visual grounding in diverse photographic contexts. We use the non-thinking configuration to evaluate the benchmark.
items.zh: RefCOCO [kazemzadeh-etal-2014-referitgame] 是用于指代表达理解的经典基准。RefCOCO 要求模型根据自然语言描述在自然场景中定位特定对象。它测试语言指令与视觉定位在不同摄影背景下的精确对齐。我们使用非思考配置来评估该基准。

items.en: IFBench [pyatkin2025generalizingverifiableinstructionfollowing] evaluates the generalization of precise instruction following across 58 new and challenging verifiable out-of-domain constraints. The tasks include complex manipulations of text, formatting, and character-level constraints, testing the model’s ability to adhere to strict output requirements. We use the thinking configuration to evaluate the benchmark.
items.zh: IFBench [pyatkin2025generalizingverifiableinstructionfollowing] 评估精确指令遵循在 58 个新的、具有挑战性的可验证域外约束上的泛化能力。任务包括文本、格式和字符级约束的复杂操作，测试模型遵守严格输出要求的能力。我们使用思考配置来评估该基准。

items.en: OCRBench V2 [fu2025ocrbenchv2improvedbenchmark] assesses large multimodal models on visual text localization and reasoning. It features a diverse set of images requiring fine-grained OCR capabilities, including the recognition and spatial grounding of text in various complex real-world scenes. We use the non-thinking configuration to evaluate the benchmark.
items.zh: OCRBench V2 [fu2025ocrbenchv2improvedbenchmark] 评估大型多模态模型在视觉文本定位和推理方面的能力。它包含一组多样化的图像，需要细粒度的 OCR 能力，包括在各种复杂真实场景中识别和空间定位文本。我们使用非思考配置来评估该基准。

items.en: SArena [wang2026internsvgunifiedsvgtasks] is part of the InternSVG suite. SArena offers unified task definitions for Scalable Vector Graphics (SVG) understanding, editing, and generation. It spans a difficulty spectrum from simple icons to complex scientific diagrams and animations, providing standardized evaluation protocols for SVG-related multimodal tasks. We adopt the icon subset and use the thinking configuration to evaluate the benchmark.
items.zh: SArena [wang2026internsvgunifiedsvgtasks] 是 InternSVG 套件的一部分。SArena 为可缩放矢量图形（SVG）的理解、编辑和生成提供统一的任务定义。它涵盖从简单图标到复杂科学图表和动画的难度范围，为 SVG 相关多模态任务提供标准化评估协议。我们采用图标子集并使用思考配置来评估该基准。

items.en: LCB V6 [jain2024livecodebenchholisticcontaminationfree] is the latest version of LiveCodeBench, which provides a holistic and contamination-free evaluation for code generation by continuously collecting problems from competitive programming platforms. It assesses models on code completion, bug fixing, and execution reasoning across multiple programming languages. We use the thinking configuration to evaluate the benchmark.
items.zh: LCB V6 [jain2024livecodebenchholisticcontaminationfree] 是 LiveCodeBench 的最新版本，通过从竞赛编程平台持续收集问题，提供全面且无污染的代码生成评估。它评估模型在多种编程语言上的代码补全、错误修复和执行推理能力。我们使用思考配置来评估该基准。

items.en: GAIA [mialon2023gaiabenchmarkgeneralai] evaluates models on real-world tasks that are conceptually simple for humans but challenging for AI. It requires the integration of tool use, multi-modal reasoning, and multi-step planning to solve practical problems across diverse digital environments. We use the thinking configuration to evaluate the benchmark. We implemented a simple agent workflow equipped with web search tools (Google & Jina) to evaluate the GAIA benchmark.
items.zh: GAIA [mialon2023gaiabenchmarkgeneralai] 评估模型在人类认为概念简单但对 AI 具有挑战性的现实世界任务上的表现。它需要整合工具使用、多模态推理和多步规划，以解决跨不同数字环境的实际问题。我们使用思考配置来评估该基准。我们实现了一个配备网络搜索工具（Google 和 Jina）的简单智能体工作流来评估 GAIA 基准。

items.en: Tau2-Bench [barres2025tau2benchevaluatingconversationalagents] evaluates conversational agents in dual-control environments, simulating technical support scenarios like telecom services. It requires models to coordinate actions with active users and interact with shared world states to resolve complex service issues. We use the thinking configuration to evaluate the benchmark. The evaluation settings follow the official settings.
items.zh: Tau2-Bench [barres2025tau2benchevaluatingconversationalagents] 在双控制环境中评估对话智能体，模拟电信服务等技术支持场景。它要求模型与活跃用户协调行动，并与共享世界状态交互以解决复杂的服务问题。我们使用思考配置来评估该基准。评估设置遵循官方设置。

items.en: ScreenSpot V2 [wu2024osatlasfoundationactionmodel] is an evaluation benchmark for GUI grounding, comprising over 1,200 instructions across iOS, Android, macOS, Windows, and Web environments. It assesses the model’s ability to precisely locate UI elements, such as text, icons, and widgets, based on natural language commands. We use the non-thinking configuration to evaluate the benchmark.
items.zh: ScreenSpot V2 [wu2024osatlasfoundationactionmodel] 是一个用于 GUI 定位的评估基准，包含超过 1,200 条指令，涵盖 iOS、Android、macOS、Windows 和 Web 环境。它评估模型根据自然语言命令精确定位 UI 元素（如文本、图标和小部件）的能力。我们使用非思考配置来评估该基准。

items.en: Overall Performance. As shown in Table 2, Intern-S1-Pro firmly demonstrates highly competitive capabilities with the first tier open-source models. Notably, its scientific reasoning capabilities are ahead of leading closed-source models. In the scientific tasks evaluation, Intern-S1-Pro significantly outperforms proprietary models like Gemini-3-Pro and GPT-5.2 on multiple benchmarks. For example, it achieves an outstanding score of 55.5 on SciReasoner, compared to 14.7 for Gemini-3-Pro and 13.6 for GPT-5.2. Furthermore, Intern-S1-Pro secures the top position on diverse scientific benchmarks including SmolInstruct (74.8), MatBench (72.8), Mol-Instructions (48.8), Biology-Instruction (52.5), and XLRS-Bench (52.8). In general tasks, Intern-S1-Pro maintains strong performance, achieving 93.1 on AIME-2025 and 86.6 on MMLU-Pro, matching or exceeding the capabilities of strong open-source models like Qwen3-VL-235B-Thinking.
items.zh: 总体性能。如表 2 所示，Intern-S1-Pro 展现出与第一梯队开源模型高度竞争的能力。值得注意的是，其科学推理能力领先于领先的闭源模型。在科学任务评估中，Intern-S1-Pro 在多个基准上显著优于 Gemini-3-Pro 和 GPT-5.2 等专有模型。例如，它在 SciReasoner 上取得了 55.5 的出色分数，而 Gemini-3-Pro 为 14.7，GPT-5.2 为 13.6。此外，Intern-S1-Pro 在多个科学基准上占据首位，包括 SmolInstruct（74.8）、MatBench（72.8）、Mol-Instructions（48.8）、Biology-Instruction（52.5）和 XLRS-Bench（52.8）。在通用任务中，Intern-S1-Pro 保持强劲性能，在 AIME-2025 上达到 93.1，在 MMLU-Pro 上达到 86.6，与 Qwen3-VL-235B-Thinking 等强大开源模型相当或更优。

items.en: Improvements over Intern-S1. Compared to the previous generation, Intern-S1, Intern-S1-Pro delivers substantial improvements in three main aspects. First, its general capabilities have been consistently improved; for instance, performance on AIME-2025 increased from 86.0 to 93.1, and MMLU-Pro improved from 83.5 to 86.6. Second, Intern-S1-Pro significantly increases its coverage of scientific tasks. Building upon the foundational scientific benchmarks evaluated in Intern-S1, the new model extends to more diverse and challenging domains such as SciReasoner, Mol-Instructions, and Biology-Instruction, while maintaining leading performance. Finally, Intern-S1-Pro introduces newly enhanced agent capabilities. It demonstrates robust multi-step planning and environmental grounding, achieving 77.4 on GAIA (Text-Only), 80.9 on τ2\tau^{2}-Bench, and 93.6 on ScreenSpot V2, marking a significant step forward in practical agentic applications.
items.zh: 与 Intern-S1 相比的改进。与前一代 Intern-S1 相比，Intern-S1-Pro 在三个方面取得了实质性改进。首先，其通用能力持续提升；例如，AIME-2025 上的性能从 86.0 提高到 93.1，MMLU-Pro 从 83.5 提高到 86.6。其次，Intern-S1-Pro 显著增加了科学任务的覆盖范围。在 Intern-S1 评估的基础科学基准之上，新模型扩展到更多样化和更具挑战性的领域，如 SciReasoner、Mol-Instructions 和 Biology-Instruction，同时保持领先性能。最后，Intern-S1-Pro 引入了新增强的智能体能力。它展示了稳健的多步规划和环境定位能力，在 GAIA（仅文本）上达到 77.4，在 τ2\tau^{2}-Bench 上达到 80.9，在 ScreenSpot V2 上达到 93.6，标志着在实际智能体应用方面迈出了重要一步。

full.sec: 5.5 Specializable Generalist could be Better: A Case Study in Biology
full.secZh: 5.5 可专精的通才可能更优：生物学案例研究

items.en: During the development of Intern-S1-Pro, we observed that a larger, more general foundation model has the potential to further enhance capabilities in highly specialized domains. We present a case study comparing Intern-S1-Pro against a specialized domain model, Biology-Instruction, on a series of biological sequence and structure tasks. As shown in Table 4, Intern-S1-Pro achieves significantly better comprehensive performance.
items.zh: 在开发 Intern-S1-Pro 的过程中，我们观察到更大、更通用的基础模型有潜力进一步增强高度专业化领域的能力。我们展示了一个案例研究，比较 Intern-S1-Pro 与专业领域模型 Biology-Instruction 在一系列生物序列和结构任务上的表现。如表 4 所示，Intern-S1-Pro 取得了显著更好的综合性能。

items.en: Notably, both models were trained on the same underlying dataset, and we only upgraded the data for Intern-S1-Pro to feature more fluent text expression, while the core biological information remained identical. Benefiting from the enhanced intelligence brought by its larger model size and stronger general reasoning capabilities, Intern-S1-Pro manages to extract and utilize the same specialized data much more effectively. For instance, on the Protein-Fluorescence task, Intern-S1-Pro achieves a score of 78.14 compared to Biology-Instruction’s 2.57, and on Protein-FunctionEC, it scores 72.70 compared to 19.79. These results strongly suggest that the integration of general and specialized capabilities is not merely an aggregation of functions, but a synergistic process that fundamentally promotes the intelligence and problem-solving capacity of the model in professional domains.
items.zh: 值得注意的是，两个模型都在相同的基础数据集上训练，我们仅为 Intern-S1-Pro 升级了数据以具有更流畅的文本表达，而核心生物信息保持不变。得益于更大模型规模和更强通用推理能力带来的增强智能，Intern-S1-Pro 能够更有效地提取和利用相同的专业数据。例如，在 Protein-Fluorescence 任务上，Intern-S1-Pro 得分为 78.14，而 Biology-Instruction 为 2.57；在 Protein-FunctionEC 上，Intern-S1-Pro 得分为 72.70，而 Biology-Instruction 为 19.79。这些结果强烈表明，通用与专业能力的整合不仅仅是功能的聚合，而是一个协同过程，从根本上提升了模型在专业领域的智能和问题解决能力。

items.en: In this report, we introduced Intern-S1-Pro, a trillion-parameter scientific multimodal foundation model designed to advance the frontiers of AI in scientific discovery. Building upon the strong foundation of Intern-S1, we scaled the model through a novel expert expansion strategy combined with Grouped Routing. This architectural innovation not only ensures efficient load balancing across devices but also significantly enhances training stability, mitigating the risks of expert homogenization and training instability often observed in large-scale MoE models.
items.zh: 在本报告中，我们介绍了 Intern-S1-Pro，一个万亿参数的科学多模态基础模型，旨在推动 AI 在科学发现领域的前沿。基于 Intern-S1 的坚实基础，我们通过结合分组路由的新型专家扩展策略对模型进行了扩展。这一架构创新不仅确保了跨设备的有效负载均衡，还显著增强了训练稳定性，减轻了大规模 MoE 模型中常见的专家同质化和训练不稳定性风险。

items.en: To further bolster the model’s scientific understanding, we conducted continued pre-training on 6T tokens of high-quality multimodal data. A critical component of this process was the development of a specialized caption pipeline tailored for scientific imagery. By generating precise, alignment-focused captions for scientific figures, we overcame the limitations of existing datasets and substantially improved the model’s ability to interpret complex scientific visual content.
items.zh: 为了进一步增强模型的科学理解能力，我们在 6T 高质量多模态数据上进行了持续预训练。该过程的一个关键组成部分是开发了专门针对科学图像的描述流水线。通过为科学图形生成精确、对齐聚焦的描述，我们克服了现有数据集的局限性，并显著提高了模型解释复杂科学视觉内容的能力。

items.en: Our extensive evaluations demonstrate that Intern-S1-Pro achieves state-of-the-art performance across a wide range of scientific benchmarks, exhibiting robust reasoning capabilities and deep domain knowledge. These results underscore the effectiveness of our architectural and data strategies. Moving forward, we aim to further expand the model’s capabilities into more specialized scientific domains for the acceleration of scientific discovery.
items.zh: 我们广泛的评估表明，Intern-S1-Pro 在众多科学基准上取得了最先进的性能，展现出稳健的推理能力和深厚的领域知识。这些结果凸显了我们的架构和数据策略的有效性。展望未来，我们旨在进一步扩展模型在更多专业科学领域的能力，以加速科学发现。
